ab: Ngaayho, o manan ko aacaen no miso?
en: A: Hello, what are you looking for?

ab: Miaca kako to cecay kopo.
en: B: I want to buy a cup.

ab: Ngaayho, o manan ko aacaen no miso?
en: A: Hello, what are you looking for?

ab: Miaca kako to cecay kafong.
en: B: I want to buy a hat.

ab: Miaca kako to kopo, paliwalay kamo haw?
ch: A:我要買杯子，你們有賣嗎?
en: A: I want to buy a cup, do you sell them?

ab: Iraay, pina ko aacaen no miso?
en: B: Yes, how many do you want to buy?

ab: paliwalay kamo to ’icep haw?
en: A: Do you sell betel nut?

ab: Awaay, cowa ka paliwal kami to ’icep.
en: B: No, we don't sell betel nut.

ab: Miaca kako to felac.
en: A: I want to buy rice.

ab: Pina ko aacaen iso a tafo?
en: B: How many packs do you want to buy?

ab: Pafelien kako to tolo a tafo.
en: A: Give me three packs.

ab: Miaca kako to konga.
en: A: I want to buy sweet potatoes.

ab: Maeminay to a mapaliwal ko konga.
en: B: All the sweet potatoes are sold out.

ab: Miaca kako to toso a silasimi.
en: A: I want to buy two bottles of oil.

ab: Cecayay to ko osaw niyam.
en: B: We only have one bottle left.

ab: Pacafayen ho kako a miaca to fitaol.
en: A: Go buy me eggs.

ab: Pina a tingting ko aacaen niso?
en: B: How many pounds do you want to buy?

ab: Pina a tingting ko aacaen iso a fitaol?
en: A: How many pounds of eggs do you want to buy?

ab: Tosa a tingting ko aacaen ako.
en: B: I want to buy two catties.

ab: Tosa lolong kenaw ko aacaen ako.
en: A: I want to buy two green onions.

ab: toloay to a lolong itini, emin han ako a pafeli kisonan.
ch: B:我這裡剩三把，都給你啦!
en: B: There are three left, all for you!

ab: Pina ko aca nona felac?
en: A: How much is this bag of rice?

ab: Tosa so’ot ko aca nona cecay a tafo.
en: B: $200 for a pack.

ab: Tosa polo’ ira ko cecay a limo’od maemin, tosa polo’ ngaay to.
en: A:The total is $21, just count $20.

ab: Akowiday.
en: B: Thank you.

ab: Siwa polo’ ira ko lima a limo’od itini.
en: A: Here's $95.

ab: Miaca ho kako, simoot han a misolot.
en: B: I'll buy some more, and make up 100 yuan.

ab: Lima so’ot ira ko mo^tep a limood maemin.
en: A:All $510.

ab: Lima soot han maemin mamaan?
en: B: Count me in for $500, okay?

ab: Atekakay tato, kaemeden mamaan?
ch: A:這個太貴了，可以算便宜一點嗎?
en: A: It's too expensive, can you make it cheaper?

ab: kati’ihay kaemeaday to koni.
ch: B:不行，這個已經很便宜了。
en: B: No, this is already very cheap.

ab: Alaen ako kona odax.
en: A: I want this packet of cookies.

ab: Tolo polo’ a limood kona odax, o manan ho ko aalaen iso?
ch: B:這餅乾30元，你還需要別的東西嗎?
en: B: $30 for the cookies, anything else you need?
